case_title: LA CONYA SINGLETON VS. RASHID AREF ABOUD

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SINGLETON, LA CONYA AS TO DEFENDANT ABOUD, RASHID AREF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.0 - SERVED AUG-19-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABOUD, RASHID AREF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGLETON, LA CONYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABOUD, RASHID AREF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
